definition: to empty out, leave desolate , (Aeschulus Tragicus); ἐκκενοῦν θυμὸν ἐς σχεδίαν γέροντος to pour out  one's spirit into Charon's boat, i. e. give up the ghost, (Theocritus Poeta Bucolicus); ἐκκ. ἰούς to shoot all  one's arrows, [variant datesAnthology Palantina:—;Pass. to be left desolate , (Aeschulus Tragicus) (ML)
